content:
# Mosquito Control

**Summary**: Strategies to reduce mosquito populations through larval removal or adult killing.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] evaluated mosquito control strategies in the context of environmental factors and GIS mapping.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] A critical public health measure in areas where mosquito-borne diseases are prevalent.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] Assessment of breeding sites and application of larvicides/insecticides.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Effective control requires identifying breeding habitats and understanding the relationship between vectors and climatic factors. ([[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016, p. 39]])
